title: Uprising
why_this_song: Uprising by Muse (2009) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 4 times; first heard in: "They will not control us"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "They'll try to push drugs that keep us all dumbed down"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Another promise, another scene"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "They will not force us"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "They will stop degrading us"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Another packaged lie to keep us trapped in greed
And all the green belts wrapped around our minds

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "control" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "control" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "keep" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "keep" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Uprising" was released in 2009. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Uprising" foi lançada em 2009. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Uprising" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Uprising" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
